bead.title: Verify retry/escalation policy with zero-config routing path
bead.description: Follow-up to ddx-b790449b AC6. Hot-fix did not change retry/escalation logic, only the auto-route default. This bead verifies that transient failures retry within tier and substantive failures escalate to next tier as expected when the loop starts from the new 'profile=cheap' default. Add an integration test that simulates a transient failure on the cheap tier and asserts escalation to standard, then smart.
